chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-2041 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 8028/25 3.For hearing of main case 17-12-2025 Mr. Gulshan Ahmed, Advocate along with petitioner No.1. M/s Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G and Imran Mobeen, APG a/w SIP Ghulam Akbar, I.O of the case. **** Mr. Abdul Sattar Thaheem, Advocate, files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.6, which is taken on record. Learned Law Officers file a joint statement on behalf of respondents No.2 to 4, along with the statement of petitioner No.1 recorded by the I.O under Section 161, Cr.P.C., which is taken on record and a copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the petitioners. In her statement, petitioner No.1 has denied the allegations levelled in the FIR and stated that the FIR is false, as she was not kidnapped. I.O submits that in view of her statement, he will submit a report under Section 173, Cr.P.C. for cancellation of the FIR as a “C-Class”. Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that, in view of the statement made by the I.O, this petition may be disposed of. Accordingly, this petition along with listed application is disposed of with the directions to the Investigating Officer to submit the report, as suggested by him, within fifteen days before the Court of competent jurisdiction. The official respondents are further directed to provide protection to petitioner No.1, as and when required. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
